items.name: Glasses
items.description:
The Bluesteel Science Glasses bring a sleek, futuristic twist to your avatar’s look. With their metallic bluesteel finish and bold scientific style, they’re ideal for lab-themed roleplay, tech outfits, or making a statement in any game. Add the Bluesteel Science Glasses to instantly upgrade your avatar’s accessory game.
